title: Swift Variables
content:
## Keyword

```swift
// var keyword
var name = "Aarush"
name = "Mike" // It is right

// let keyword
let pi = 3.141592657
pi = 3.141592658 // It is wrong
```

## Define

### explicit declaration

```swift
// define
var age: Int
// initialization
age = 28

// define && initialization
let message: String = "This is a message!"

```

### implicit declaration

```swift
let name = "Aarush" // String
var age = 16 // Int
```

## Types

### Integer

```swift
// Integer
var age: Int = 9223372036854775807 // x64, = Int64 ; x32, = Int32
var age8: Int8 = -128 // -2^7 to 2^7 - 1
var age16: Int16 = 32767 // -2^15 to 2^15 - 1
var age32: Int32 = 2147483647 // -2^31 to 2^31 - 1
var age64: Int64 = 9223372036854775807 // -2^63 to 2^63 - 1
```

### Float | Double

```swift
// Float | Double
var pi1: Float = 3.14 // 1.2E-38 to 3.4E+38 (~6 digits)
var pi2: Double = 3.14 // 2.3E-308 to 1.7E+308 (~15 digits)
```

### String | Character

```swift
// String | Character
let text1: Character = "d"
let text2: String = "This is a message!"
var text3: String = String(13) // "13"
```

### Bool

```swift
// Bool
let isTrue: Bool = true
var isFalse: Bool = false
```

## Methods and Properties

```swift
let text: String = "This is a message!"

// Properties
text.count // 18
text.isEmpty // false

// Methods
text.lowercased() // "this is a message!"
text.uppercased() // "THIS IS A MESSAGE!"
```
